reviews.comment:
Viernes 5 de enero, 22:45 hs. La Full, cerrada. No hay dónde conseguir una botellita de agua mineral ni un café. El baño, tan mugriento como acostumbra, y sin papel ni jabón.

(Translated by Google)
Friday, January 5, 10:45 p.m. Full closed. Nowhere to get a bottle of mineral water or a coffee. The bathroom is as filthy as usual, and there's no toilet paper or soap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxNVkyRDF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
YPF decente no muy grande. Agua caliente 8 puntos, sale 100$ si nos sos socio del ACA, pero de noche es gratis.
Baño de mujeres tenía papel y jabón, el de hombres lo estaban limpiando.

(Translated by Google)
YPF is decent, though not very big. Hot water is excellent; it costs $100 if you're not an ACA member, but it's free at night.
The women's restroom had toilet paper and soap; the men's restroom was being cleaned.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxMUxyQWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Como la mayoria de las estaciones de servicio YPF, cuando se está viajando mucho se sienten como un oasis donde cargar combustible, comer algo, descansar, recargar energía y seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Like most YPF service stations, when you're traveling a lot they feel like an oasis where you can refuel, eat something, rest, recharge your energy and continue your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxMU5UR3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A place to rest a little on the Trelew - Comodoro Rivadavia stretch

reviews.comment:
Muy  caro sus productos. En algunos casos los baños podrían estar mas limpios y con olor agradable.

(Translated by Google)
Their products are very expensive. In some cases, the bathrooms could be cleaner and smell nicer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxNy1UM2NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Esta estación es un paraje histórico sobre la ruta N3 , la atención es según la demanda que tengan en el momento , puede ser lento o inmediato, y a veces se sufre la espera cuando se debe llegar el camión con combustible para sus reservas.
Es tan visitada ,no solo por particulares, empresas y transportistas  además por muchísimo turismo . Ya quedó como una estructura antigua ,no actualizada  frente a otras estaciones que tambien están en puntos estrategicos , es momento de cambiar y renovar. Hay que tener cuidado con el ingreso a la estación, tanto norte como sur ,falta iluminación y mantenimiento .

(Translated by Google)
This station is a historic landmark on Route N3. Service depends on demand at any given time; it can be slow or immediate, and sometimes there's a wait when the fuel truck is due to arrive. It's a popular destination, frequented not only by individuals, businesses, and truckers, but also by a significant number of tourists. It now looks like an outdated structure, not updated compared to other stations in similarly strategic locations. It's time for a change and a renovation. Caution should be exercised when entering the station, both from the north and south, as there is a lack of lighting and maintenance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxOF95VmZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Martes 2 de enero 17 hs, la estación de servicio no tiene combustible. Inicio de temporada, hay unas 20 personas esperando que llegue el camión con nafta para poder seguir viaje. Esta estación vive gracias a que no hay otra a 200 km a la redonda.

(Translated by Google)
Tuesday, January 2nd, 5 PM, the gas station is out of fuel. It's the start of the season, and about 20 people are waiting for the truck to arrive with gasoline so they can continue their journey. This station survives because there isn't another one within a 200 km radius.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxbzgzbG9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estaba cerrado el full ( era 1 de enero) pero era el único lugar posible donde comer algo

(Translated by Google)
The full was closed (it was January 1st) but it was the only possible place to get something to eat
